story: When my parents passed, I took over the farm, and Alya stood by me; when hers passed, I did the same. We shared our table, chores, and laughter. She drew me into every crowd. She dreamed of the ocean: a little house and salty air. Two days earlier at the bakery, she’d privately told the baker that a plain ring and a vow under any tree would suit her fine. She was more than a friend; she was my partner. I wanted to make it official.
implausible_knowledge: Two days earlier at the bakery, she’d privately told the baker that a plain ring and a vow under any tree would suit her fine.
question: As he decides how to ask for her hand, what will he most likely do next to make it official?
answer_with_knowledge: Propose with a simple ring and a plain vow.
answer_without_knowledge: Begin secretly saving and prepare a surprise Proposal.
